name: fivem-resource-builder
description: Claude Code skill that scaffolds and builds complete, secure-by-default FiveM/RedM resources — fxmanifest, framework bridge (ESX, QBCore, QBox, ND_Core), server/client logic, NUI, and database wiring with validation, rate limiting, anti-dupe, and cleanup baked in. Pairs with fivem-security-audit. Optimized for Opus 4.8.
author: Dei
